query: SELECT i.invoice_number, i.type, COUNT(ii.id) as item_count FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN invoice_items ii ON ii.invoice_id = i.id GROUP BY i.id ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT i.invoice_number, i.type, COUNT(ii.id) as item_count FROM invoices i LEFT JOIN invoice_items ii ON ii.invoice_id = i.id GROUP BY i.id ORDER BY i.created_at DESC LIMIT 15;
